name: skill-checker
description: Validation and quality assurance system for skills in the KI-Dev-Agent ecosystem
author: KI-Dev-Agent Team

tools.name: validate_skill
tools.description: Validate a skill's structure and metadata

tools.name: validate_all_skills
tools.description: Validate all skills in the skills directory

tools.name: check_skill_json
tools.description: Validate skill.json structure and required fields

tools.name: check_documentation
tools.description: Check if a skill has adequate documentation

tools.name: generate_validation_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive validation report for one or all skills

skill_path.description: Path to specific skill or 'all' for all skills

output_format.description: Output format: markdown, json, or html
